hero.heading: A wholesaler that shows up at your house.
hero.lede1: Since 2001 we've fabricated and installed stone across the Main Line from our Ardmore showroom. We buy slabs by the container and cut them in our own shop — so you get wholesale pricing and a single crew that's accountable start to finish.
hero.lede2: The owner still runs templates himself. That's why the seams line up and the estimate holds.
hero.alt: WGMT showroom interior with slab displays and sample boards

values.title: In-house fabrication
values.desc: Every slab is templated and cut in our own shop — no middleman, no markup.

values.title: One accountable crew
values.desc: Counters, cabinets, and tile from the same team, on one schedule.

values.title: Lifetime installation warranty
values.desc: We stand behind every install for as long as you own the home.

cta.text: Come meet us — the coffee's on.
